title: Iterate over borrowed collection wrappers
scenario: For loops over &OrderLines should borrow each line instead of consuming the wrapper.

hints.body: Keep the Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code active and implement IntoIterator for &OrderLines, yielding &OrderLine values.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Iterate over borrowed collection wrappers is shown below.

completionExplanation: Iterate over borrowed collection wrappers now extends the active Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code with wrap ref into iterator. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
